note: Run-1 (2026-05-27, baseline-001): 486 findings. Run-2 (+2 P0s EM-ORG-019/020). Run-3 (2026-05-27): 19 findings reclassified RESOLVED after P0 sprint (commits verified). Run-4 (2026-05-27): 8 §10.2 P0 auth/IDOR findings reclassified RESOLVED (enforce-fix-004, commit 80f11f7). EX-006 remains BLOCKED as own-phase.
baseline_coverage_note: 392 findings in baseline. 27 RESOLVED (19 P0 sprint + 8 §10.2 auth fixes). P0 open: 146 (173 total P0 in JSON, 27 resolved). p0_counts in module_identity are computed from findings (authoritative).
